Name: Aegis Tiburon
Description:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Heavy Gunship

An evolution of a proven Aegis design, the Tiburon's anti-capital ship configuration comprises a spine mounted forward facing beam weapon, supplemented by side mounted turrets.
DescriptionText: An evolution of a proven Aegis design, the Tiburon's anti-capital ship configuration comprises a spine mounted forward facing beam weapon, supplemented by side mounted turrets.
